products.name: Platform Studio
products.summary: A command-driven website builder for teams that want content generation, media sourcing, and deploy automation inside one repo.
products.outcome: Launch product pages and campaigns from structured commands.

products.name: Deploy Ops
products.summary: A deployment monitor that tracks content changes, commit history, and Cloudflare rebuild expectations.
products.outcome: Move from ad-hoc publishing to predictable AI-assisted releases.
